title: 1 step DFU - Language update when both EB and CC are on the latest version
scenario: Verify language update via 1-step DFU succeeds when both Earbuds and Charge Case are on the latest firmware version
steps: Start app with Osprey, EB (Earbuds), and CC (Charge Case) on the latest firmware version.
Check language on Charge Case by navigating menus via touch screen.
expected: 1. Software update screen is displayed after tapping Update Now. 2. Language change finishes successfully. 3. Language is properly changed for Charge Case.
